name: Elecom Co., Ltd.
summary: Elecom Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells personal computer and digital device related products worldwide. The company offers peripherals, I/O devices, and PC accessories, such as mouse pads, mice, and keyboards; tablet PCs and smartphones, as well as health care products, including body composition scales and electric therapy equipment; digital field products; network products, such as wireless LAN routers; audio visual device-related products; wearable products; and application development products, as well as cloud and installation services for wireless LAN access points. The company was incorporated in 1986 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
